title: Scene Dispatch Contract
description: Dispatch table mapping encounter_type to sub-loop skill paths. Pure routing rules — no code.

combat.description: Combat sub-loop — initiative, turns, attack/damage resolution

social.description: Social sub-loop — NPC dialogue, persuasion, deception, intimidation

challenge.description: Challenge sub-loop — skill checks, traps, puzzles, environmental hazards

merchant.description: Merchant sub-loop — buy, sell, trade, barter

rest.description: Rest sub-loop — short rest, long rest, hit dice recovery, spell slot recovery

travel.description: Travel sub-loop — overland movement, random encounters, navigation, foraging

item-use.description: Item-use sub-loop — consumable usage, equipment interaction, attunement

encounter_type.description: Encounter type key used to look up the target sub-loop in dispatch_table

encounter_type_must_exist.rule: encounter_type must be a key in dispatch_table

input_must_match_action_contract.rule: Input data must conform to scene-action-contract.json schema

output_must_match_outcome_contract.rule: Output data must conform to scene-outcome-contract.json schema

examples.description: Dispatches a combat encounter to the combat sub-loop skill
